description_long: This object is shaped like a lemon, with a smooth, slightly glossy yellow peel covering one half and a metallic, riveted surface covering the other half. The yellow side mimics the natural texture and color of a real lemon, while the metallic side features a silvery finish with a row of evenly spaced rivets running vertically along the seam. The transition between the organic and metallic halves is marked by a stitched or riveted line, giving the appearance of a hybrid between fruit and machine. Subtle surface details, such as dimples and faint imperfections, are visible on both the natural and metallic sides. The object is ovoid and appears solid, with no visible openings or interactive components beyond the seam.
description: A hybrid lemon object with one half natural yellow peel and the other half metallic with rivets, joined by a stitched seam.
description_view_0: The view shows the smooth, yellow, natural lemon peel with no visible seam or metallic features.
description_view_1: This view reveals the transition from yellow peel to a beige, stitched seam, highlighting the hybrid nature of the object.
description_view_2: The metallic side with a row of rivets is prominent, with some beige and yellow visible along the seam.
description_view_3: A full view of the metallic, riveted half directly opposite the yellow peel, emphasizing the object's dual composition.
attribute_peel_condition: The lemon's peel is smooth and intact on the yellow side, with no visible cracks or wrinkles, while the metallic side is seamless and riveted.
